query: SELECT u.name, u.email, s.tier, s.wompiPaymentSourceId, s.cardBrand, s.cardLastFour, s.cardHolderName, s.wompiCardToken FROM users u LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON u.id = s.userId WHERE u.name LIKE '%MARIA%' OR u.name LIKE '%Maria%' OR u.name LIKE '%LOPEZ%' LIMIT 5;
